header: Start free today. Go Pro when it pays for itself.
subheadline: Every tier ships all 255 elements — the difference is how fast you move. Community is free forever under GPL-2.0; Pro adds the creators' time, guarantees, and early access for less than an hour of agency billing per month.
left_description: The full package, free under GPL-2.0: 255 elements, 15 presets, 49 Fluid components, complete source on GitHub, and community support.
right_description: Everything in Community plus priority email support with 2-day response, guaranteed LTS compatibility updates, and early access to new element drops. €490/year — two months free.
